subject: Cutting tax season chaos with automation
body:
Hi,

I noticed Kawatra CPA serves clients in the Nashville area. Tax season is brutal for small firms, especially when it comes to chasing clients for documents.

We help CPA firms set up automated document request workflows. Clients get a personalized checklist, automatic reminders, and a secure upload portal. Your team stops sending "did you send that W-2?" emails.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Small firm likely handling client communication manually
Manual document collection during tax season
